(G5A) Cane/Walker/Crutch CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of locomotion in last 7 days - cane/walker/crutch. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
243 G5B G5B_SELF_WHEEL (G5B) Wheeled Self CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of locomotion in last 7 days - wheeled self. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
244 G5C G5C_OTHER_WHEEL (G5C) Other Person Wheeled CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of locomotion in last 7 days - other person
